search_document:
User Request: Show quarterly sales.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Quarterly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Quarterly revenue trend
Title: Top Products by Sales
Type: table
Description: Products with the highest sales volume
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue for the quarter
Title: Sales by Region
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across different regions
Title: Sales Growth
Type: kpi
Description: Percentage growth in sales compared to previous quarter

sql_queries.title: Quarterly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-Q%q', OrderDate) AS Quarter, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Quarter ORDER BY Quarter

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Sales
sql_queries.description: Products with the highest sales volume
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', 'now')

sql_queries.title: Sales by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipRegion, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipRegion ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Sales Growth
sql_queries.description: Percentage growth in sales compared to previous quarter
sql_queries.sql: WITH CurrentQuarter AS (SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', 'now')), PreviousQuarter AS (SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', date('now', '-3 months'))) SELECT ((CurrentQuarter.Revenue - PreviousQuarter.Revenue) / PreviousQuarter.Revenue) * 100 AS SalesGrowth FROM CurrentQuarter, PreviousQuarter
